pi_items.source: Verified against 'task_utils.sh' and 'setup_task.sh' which explicitly set and use MUNCIE_DIR to this path.
Verified against 'task_utils.sh' and 'export_result.sh' which explicitly set and use RESULTS_DIR to this path.
Verified against 'setup_task.sh' (which enforces this name by copying the file) and 'export_result.sh' (which reads this filename).
Contradicted by 'verifier.py' which checks 'if error < 0.25:' (a 25% tolerance), rather than 20%.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the Muncie HEC-RAS example dataset, a real-world public dataset distributed with the official Linux HEC-RAS v6.6 release. The environment places the Muncie HDF5 results in '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf' and expects the agent to create 'loop_rating_summary.csv' and 'loop_rating_curves.png' in '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results'. The accuracy tolerance implemented in 'verifier.py' is 25%, contradicting the 20% claimed in the task metadata.
